speakers.name: Jordan Kershaw
speakers.title: Senior Solutions Architect
speakers.bio: Designs edge computing solutions at the intersection of AI, open source, and real-world deployment. Creator of the EVY platform and edge-ai-cpu-inference quickstart.

speakers.name: Sarah Chen
speakers.title: Principal Engineer, AI Platforms
speakers.bio: Leads Intel's work on CPU-optimized AI inference, specializing in AVX-512 and AMX acceleration for quantized models on Xeon processors.

speakers.name: Alex Rivera
speakers.title: AI/ML Engineer
speakers.bio: Builds retrieval-augmented generation systems for disconnected and low-resource environments. Contributor to ChromaDB and sentence-transformers.

speakers.name: Min Zhang
speakers.title: Research Scientist
speakers.bio: Core contributor to BitNet and the 1.58-bit quantization research. Works on making large language models accessible on commodity hardware.

speakers.name: Priya Patel
speakers.title: Edge Computing Lead
speakers.bio: Leads Red Hat's edge computing practice, helping organizations deploy OpenShift and AI workloads at thousands of edge sites worldwide.

speakers.name: Dr. Marcus Johnson
speakers.title: Director of Technology
speakers.bio: Deploys technology solutions in disaster zones and conflict areas. Advocates for appropriate tech that works where infrastructure has failed.

speakers.name: Tara O'Brien
speakers.title: Security Architect
speakers.bio: Specializes in container security, supply chain integrity, and building hardened UBI-based images for regulated and edge environments.

speakers.name: David Kim
speakers.title: Senior Software Engineer
speakers.bio: Works on fleet management and orchestration tools for edge AI deployments at scale. Contributor to the Open Edge Platform.

speakers.name: Dr. Lisa Wang
speakers.title: VP of Open Source Strategy
speakers.bio: Shapes Red Hat's open source AI strategy, including model licensing, community governance, and the InstructLab project.

speakers.name: James Whitfield
speakers.title: CTO
speakers.bio: Leads a global initiative to bring technology to underserved communities. Believes AI should be accessible to everyone, everywhere, regardless of infrastructure.
